case_title: TIDEWATER FINANCE COMPANY VS. MARY FINLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $364.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100049736) AS TO DEFENDANT FINLEY, MARY AN INDIVIDUAL
